grant_and_term.license_type: Non-exclusive license to use System at specified location
grant_and_term.re_licensing: At franchisor's sole discretion; must sign then-current FA with potentially materially different terms

fee_and_payment_obligations.monthly_royalty: 5.5% of GRR, payable by 15th of following month
fee_and_payment_obligations.monthly_program: 4% of GRR (may increase up to +1%), payable by 15th of following month
fee_and_payment_obligations.grr_definition: All revenues from guest room sales including loyalty redemptions, bundled breakfast, mandatory guest fees, no-shows; excludes taxes
fee_and_payment_obligations.electronic_funds_transfer: Franchisor may require wire/ACH for all payments
fee_and_payment_obligations.offset_right: Franchisor may reduce any payment/credit by amounts franchisee owes
fee_and_payment_obligations.interest_on_overdue: 18% per annum (or max lawful rate if lower)

site_selection_and_construction.auto_extensions: 30-day rolling extensions for New Dev/Conversion until 60-day notice given

training_and_operational_obligations.staffing_control: Franchisee is independent contractor; franchisor does not direct personnel
training_and_operational_obligations.service_quality_improvement_program: Mandatory if below minimum standards for 6+ months

curable_defaults.trigger: Failure to comply with any FA provision/Manual/Standard

non_curable_defaults: Failure to operate 5+ consecutive days (non-force majeure) (FA §13.2(6))
Any Hotel Agreement terminated for breach (FA §13.2(16))
interim_remedies: Diversion of reservations to other hotels

coo_transfers.conditions: Meet current standards, sign then-current FA, PIP compliance

transfer_restrictions.mortgage_pledge: Permitted without consent if sole borrower and single-hotel collateral; otherwise requires consent and lender comfort letter ($3,500 fee)

default_and_cross_default.cross_default: Termination of any Hotel Agreement for franchisee breach triggers FA termination (FA §13.2(16))
default_and_cross_default.hits_cross_default: HITS Agreement terminates when FA terminates
default_and_cross_default.guarantee_enforcement: Franchisor may require third-party guaranty after default notice as cure condition

noncompete.during_term: Cannot be franchisor/licensor of competing brand; CAN be franchisee/manager of competing brand
noncompete.competitor_definition: Any individual/entity that owns/is licensor/franchisor of a Competing Brand (a brand competing with System in franchisor's sole judgment)

guaranty_scope.unlimited: Assumes and agrees to discharge certain of Franchisee's obligations (scope determined per application review)
guaranty_scope.third_party_guaranty: May be required for lender comfort letters or after default notice

liquidated_damages.pre_opening_formula: System's Average Monthly Royalty × 60 (if hotel not built and then competitor hotel at site within 1 year; or if after Hotel Work begins but before opening)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_first_2yr: Greater of Hotel's or System's Average Monthly Royalty × 60
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Average Monthly Royalty × remaining months
liquidated_damages.measurement_period: Hotel's: 24-month lookback; System's: 12-month per-room average × approved rooms
liquidated_damages.exclusions: Temporary financial accommodations and Business Interruptions excluded from averages

venue_and_dispute_resolution.venue: US District Court ED Virginia (Alexandria) or Fairfax County VA state court; franchisor may also sue at hotel location
venue_and_dispute_resolution.arbitration: None (except Puerto Rico — AAA/JAMS in Fairfax County; seat in NY)

insurance_requirements.franchisor_remedy: May obtain insurance on franchisee's behalf if not maintained; franchisee pays actual amount

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must indemnify franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, all subsidiaries/affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, successors, assigns
indemnification.triggers: Any claimed occurrence at Hotel; any claim, demand, tax, penalty, judicial/administrative proceeding
indemnification.includes: Attorneys' fees, court costs, all expenses

force_majeure.casualty_rebuild: 18 months to reopen after casualty-related closure
force_majeure.election_not_to_rebuild: Franchisor may terminate; LD released if no competing hotel at site within 3 years

distinctive_clauses.general_release: Required on re-licensing and transfer (FA §16.8); subject to state addenda limitations
distinctive_clauses.confidentiality_of_negotiated_terms: FA §16.18 — terms negotiated between parties are confidential
distinctive_clauses.economic_conditions_not_defense: FA §16.10 — economic conditions are not a defense to obligations
distinctive_clauses.sanctions_and_anti_bribery: Extensive representations (FA §16.13) — cannot be Sanctioned Person, cannot make improper payments, must cooperate with investigations
distinctive_clauses.attorney_in_fact: Franchisee appoints franchisor as exclusive attorney-in-fact for trademark dispute prosecution/defense (FA §9.4.2)
distinctive_clauses.restricted_area_template: FA Addendum contains optional Restricted Area provision — mile radius or described area, with numerous carve-outs for other brands, chains of 4+ hotels, gaming, timeshare, etc.
